purpose: Define the browser/Codex inspection plan for HKJC racecard page links, scripts, and network payloads after PR-138 without promoting records. This file is not a calendar input.

inspection_environment.reason: The current assistant web fetch cannot safely open the date-addressable HKJC racecard URL, so racecard links/scripts/network payloads must be inspected with a browser-capable executor.
required_controls: Use only official HKJC racing.hkjc.com URLs.
Do not scrape odds, pools, betting, dividends, predictions, or tips.
Record only race_number, race_time, racecourse, meeting_date, source_url, and extraction route metadata.

inspection_targets.method: Open the known working racecard URL and inspect anchor href values and race navigation controls.
inspection_targets.success_condition: Find official same-meeting links or controls for every race number in the meeting.

inspection_targets.method: Inspect page scripts and inline data for race navigation, meeting code, race list, or race time payloads.
inspection_targets.success_condition: Find source-visible race_number/race_time data or a stable endpoint name used by the official page.

inspection_targets.method: Use browser Network panel while loading the official racecard page and changing race navigation.
inspection_targets.success_condition: Find stable official request(s) that return all races or individual racecards by RaceNo/Racecourse/racedate.

inspection_targets.method: Look for an official meeting-level card/index/summary page linked from racecard or fixture pages.
inspection_targets.success_condition: Find a meeting-level official page listing all races and their start times for 2026-06-03 Happy Valley.

expected_snapshot_schema_if_found.source_url: official HKJC URL used to verify the full meeting list

races.race_source_url: official HKJC racecard URL for that race

derived_fields_allowed_after_full_snapsh: first_race_time from races[0].race_time after sorting by race_number only if all race rows are source-verified
last_race_time from final races item after sorting by race_number only if all race rows are source-verified
race_count from races.length only if the full race list is source-verified

promotion_decision.last_race_time_definition: Final race start time, not meeting_end_time.

next_steps: Run the inspection with Codex or local browser DevTools.
If a full race list is found, add a one-meeting race_number/race_time snapshot in the next PR.
Only after that, evaluate whether the same official route works for every June 2026 HKJC meeting.
